items.name: Dark Tempest Eye
items.description:
Peer into the abyss of power. This cursed artifact whispers secrets of shadows and storms, promising untold strength to those who dare wield it. But beware, for with great power comes great sacrifice. Will you embrace the darkness, or be consumed by it?

Collab with Nifloxeo :)
